n: A Man Adrift, Part 1: Of Fruit and Ruffians

steps.t: At the nearby docks in the Fleet-fast, there is a dispute going on at one of the ships. A fruitmonger and a deck-steward are arguing about fruit shipm…
You have found Râkariz and the deck-steward arguing about the shipment of fruit. You should inspect the fruit to see its condition.
You have inspected the fruit in question, and it is indeed rotten. You noticed a stamp that indicated the fruit came from Khûtra. You should confront …
You have inspected the fruit and confronted Râkariz with the knowledge that provisions from Khûtra have somehow been corrupted after the fall of Mâkhd…
